overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Japanese-inspired urban plaza. The player ascends from a back alley into a sunlit open square with traditional wooden architecture mixed with cyberpunk high-rises, then enters a commercial building and climbs a neon-lit stairwell to an upper pedestrian level.

events.description: ascending concrete stairs from alley to upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking up exterior stairs from narrow back alley into brighter area

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt walking in the distance near garage doors

entered.detail: large white armored delivery truck with yellow hazard stripes
exterior concrete stairs leading upward to plaza
industrial garage door with yellow painted markings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow service alley facing a large industrial truck. The player walks toward and ascends a concrete staircase, passing metal roll-up doors on the right, transitioning from the enclosed alley toward a brighter open area above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with traditional Japanese market architecture

events.description: exits narrow stairwell into wide open sunlit plaza
turning slightly right while walking through plaza center

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza observing traditional architecture and market stalls

notable_agents.action: person in orange outfit standing near concrete benches

entered.detail: Japanese-style wooden market stalls with curved tiled roofs
traditional red and white paper lanterns strung across the plaza
teal-colored commercial building with pink neon HOTEL signage
greenish square tile pattern covering the plaza ground

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a bright open plaza, the scene reveals traditional Japanese wooden market structures lining the path, red paper lanterns hanging overhead, and a green hotel building with neon signage on the right. The player walks past scattered pedestrians and benches while tall cyberpunk towers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza under elevated highway with outdoor cafes

events.description: walking underneath massive elevated highway overpass
passing from shadow of overpass back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor cafe seating areas under the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: person with visible cybernetic arm enhancements walking alongside

entered.detail: massive concrete highway ramp passing overhead
large teal patio umbrellas shading outdoor cafe tables
stacked cardboard delivery boxes near building entrance

segments.scene_description: The player walks beneath a massive elevated highway structure that casts shadows over the plaza, passing outdoor cafes with green umbrellas on the left. The lighting shifts as the player moves back into sunlight, with the hotel building now visible in the distance and cardboard boxes stacked near the right wall.

events.description: entering indoor stairwell from outdoor plaza
transition from natural light to artificial neon lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs inside commercial building past vending machines

notable_agents.action: person descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: illuminated corporate sign for Delamain with white lettering
white ceramic tile walls with some graffiti markings
large digital billboard displaying toothbrush commercial
cyan neon directional arrow mounted on wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a commercial building stairwell, leaving the plaza behind. The environment shifts to white tiled walls with a Delamain sign visible on the left. The player ascends past vending machines and digital advertisement screens while the lighting becomes artificially lit.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper stairwell with pink neon and graffiti

events.description: stairwell lighting shifts to prominent pink and magenta neon glow
approaching bright exit doorway at top of stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing ascent through graffiti-covered stairwell toward exit

entered.detail: magenta and pink fluorescent lighting strips illuminating stairs
colorful spray paint tags and street art on tile walls
doorway with bright natural light streaming from outside

segments.scene_description: The stairwell transitions to a distinct aesthetic with vibrant pink neon lighting and extensive graffiti covering the walls. The player continues climbing toward a bright exit doorway visible at the top of the stairs, with no other pedestrians present in this section.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city views

events.description: exiting stairwell onto upper level pedestrian bridge
turning right to view the city skyline and highway structure

agents.ego_description: emerging onto upper walkway and observing the surrounding cityscape

entered.detail: elevated walkway with metal railings overlooking lower levels
tall cyberpunk residential towers with multiple billboards
large illuminated advertisement on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player exits the stairwell onto an elevated pedestrian bridge with metal railings, revealing expansive views of the cyberpunk city skyline. Tall towers with glowing billboards dominate the background, and the elevated highway structure is visible from above. The scene is bathed in bright midday sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined industrial alleyway into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban plaza that blends traditional Japanese aesthetics with futuristic architecture. It begins in a narrow service alley facing a large industrial truck, moving forward and ascending a concrete staircase past metal roll-up doors. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a bright plaza filled with traditional wooden market structures, red paper lanterns, and a green hotel building accented by neon signage. The path then leads beneath the heavy shadow of a massive elevated highway, passing outdoor cafes with green umbrellas before shifting back into the sunlight. Finally, the camera continues forward past stacked cardboard boxes with the distant hotel and towering cyberpunk skyscrapers framing the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous ascent from a sterile commercial interior into a vibrant, sun-drenched urban vista. It begins as the camera enters a building stairwell, leaving the plaza behind to move past white tiled walls, vending machines, and digital advertisements under artificial light. As the climb continues, the environment shifts into a gritty aesthetic defined by vibrant pink neon lighting and extensive graffiti covering the walls. The camera then pushes toward a bright exit doorway at the top of the stairs, finally emerging onto an elevated pedestrian bridge with metal railings. This transition reveals an expansive view of the cyberpunk city skyline, where tall towers and glowing billboards stand under the bright midday sunlight.
